perceivedDisruption.question: During the reading task, I stopped reading to respond to messages that appeared on the screen
The messages that appeared on the screen during reading made it harder to focus on the article.

perceivedAIUsefulness.question: The AI reading assistant guided me toward understanding the article rather than simply giving me the answers
Using the AI reading assistant during reading helped me better understand the key ideas in the article

filteringQuestions.question: Which of the following features were available to you during the reading task?
options: An AI reading assistant and an Instant messaging / chat pop-up
